name: Electroplating EHS Multi-Chemical Entry
description:
Add two new EHS chemical records to the pre-loaded 'Apex Metal Finishing' facility.

1) Sodium Cyanide (CAS: 143-33-9): EHS=Yes, State=Solid, Health Hazard=Acute Toxicity (any route), Max Daily=500 lbs, Avg Daily=250 lbs, Days=365, Storage=Vat (or Open Vessel) at ambient pressure/temperature.

2) Nitric Acid (CAS: 7697-37-2): EHS=Yes, State=Liquid, Physical Hazards=Oxidizer and Corrosive to metal, Health Hazards=Skin Corrosion/Irritation and Serious eye damage/irritation, Max Daily=1200 lbs, Avg Daily=800 lbs, Days=365, Storage=Carboy (or Plastic Receptacle) at ambient pressure/temperature.

Use the EPA Tier2 Submit application. Import the baseline facility from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\apex_plating_2025.t2s. Save the updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\apex_plating_2025_updated.t2s.
